iGotit
FeaturesPricingDocsContactGet Started

AI Agent Orchestration for the Real World

Deploy AI agent teams on your infrastructure. Dynamic scaling, human-agent collaboration, security-first design. Plug into your existing workflows.

Get StartedView Pricing

Deploy in Minutes

On your infrastructure

Unlimited Agents

Scale on demand

BYOT

Bring your own tokens

100% Open Core

MIT licensed foundation

Everything you need to run AI agent teams

From a single agent to an entire AI workforce — with the governance your enterprise demands.

Agent Factory

Dynamically spawn, configure, and retire agents. Scale teams up to meet deadlines with role-based templates.

Task Dependencies

DAG-based task management with automatic unblocking. Agents know what to work on next.

Security & Governance

Policy engine, runtime sandboxes, kill switches, and tamper-proof audit trails.

Smart Budgets

Hierarchical budgets with forecasting, ROI tracking, and multi-resource accounting.

Human-Agent Collaboration

Agents work in your existing tools — Slack, GitHub, Jira. Not a separate dashboard.

AutoResearch

Hypothesis-driven experiment loops. Build, measure, learn — tied to measurable business goals.

Up and running in four steps

1

Deploy

Run iGotit on your infrastructure with a single docker command. Bring your own LLM tokens.

2

Onboard

iGotit learns your company — domain, goals, workflows, team structure.

3

Build Your Team

Use the Agent Factory to spawn agents from templates. Set OKRs, assign skills, define boundaries.

4

Ship

Agents collaborate on tasks, report progress, and escalate to humans when needed.

Ready to orchestrate your AI workforce?
